stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 698 Figure 4.28.
Given the following information for a Commercial Air Transport jet aircraft, what is the minimum field length required?

Landing mass: 51 000 kg
Flaps position: 30°
RWY condition: DRY
Wind component: 10 kt tailwind
Pressure Altitude: 2000 ft
Anti-skid: OPERATIVE
Spoilers: AUTOMATIC
